destinations.name: Mombasa, Kenya
destinations.description: The Cradle of Humanity is famous for its epic safaris, the Great Migration, and the towering Mount Kenya.
destinations.notes: I just want to stay indoors in a new country
tips: Book a hotel in Mombasa, not Nairobi - It is more quiet

destinations.name: Valencia, Spain
destinations.description: The City of Arts and Sciences is famous for its futuristic architecture, sun-drenched beaches, and authentic paella.
destinations.notes: Must visit the City of Arts and Sciences
tips: Get a SUMA card for the metro
Have breakfast inclusive in the hotel

destinations.name: Flic en Flac, Mauritius
destinations.notes: Want to explore the island and relax on the beach
tips: Live like a local and eat local delicacies
Try not to drown in the ocean

destinations.name: Accra, Ghana
destinations.description: The Gateway to Africa is famous for its vibrant Kente cloth, the smoky spice of Ghana Jollof, and its legendary, leaf-wrapped Waakye
destinations.notes: Want to try many local delicacies and try around Accra

destinations.name: Braga, Portugal
destinations.notes: Must take a walk around the city
tips: Stay in the city center, close to restaurants and shops
Try new food in the city
Take a long walk around the city

destinations.name: Cape Town, South Africa
destinations.description: Beautiful city with Table Mountain, penguins at the beach, and amazing vineyards
destinations.notes: Want to hike Table Mountain and see the penguins
tips: Take the cable car up Table Mountain

destinations.name: London, UK
destinations.description: Historic city with royal palaces, double-decker buses, and amazing museums
destinations.notes: Want to see Buckingham Palace and ride a red bus!
tips: See the Changing of the Guard
Take a ride on the London Eye

destinations.name: Banff, Canada
destinations.description: Stunning mountains, turquoise lakes, and incredible hiking trails
destinations.notes: Must see Lake Louise and spot some wildlife!

destinations.name: Luxembourg City, Luxembourg
destinations.description: Fairytale city with ancient fortresses, deep valleys, and charming old town
destinations.notes: Want to walk across the viaduct and explore the casemates
tips: Walk along the Chemin de la Corniche

destinations.name: Svishtov, Bulgaria
destinations.description: Historic Danube river town with ancient ruins and Bulgarian charm
destinations.notes: Want to see the river and experience authentic Bulgarian culture
tips: Take a walk along the Danube
